case_title: SIMON CRUZ VS. VICTOR HUGO JUAREZ, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA AZTECA et al

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF SIMON CRUZ'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWER TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS ($640.00) IS GRANTED. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SIMON CRUZ's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions ($640.00) is Granted. No opposition was filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, not reported.
